prompt: Create a highly detailed dark fantasy anime illustration of a mysterious male celestial astrologer, unnamed star diviner, seated at an ornate cosmic divination table in a deep blue observatory filled with stars, nebulae, and glowing magic. He has messy black hair falling over his forehead, with his face deliberately covered by a plain dark gray square censor block, and wears layered midnight-blue and black robes with teal inner fabric, gold embroidery, delicate chains, constellation ornaments, sapphire pendants, and luminous celestial jewelry. His right hand holds a slender gold-and-black wand or pointer angled downward, while his left hand touches a glowing astrological circle on the tabletop. The table surface is a glossy star map covered with golden zodiac rings, constellation lines, sparkling points of light, and six visible floating or resting glass Earth-like spheres: one large glowing globe near the center foreground, one large blurred partial globe at the lower left foreground, one partial globe at the lower right foreground, one medium globe at the right side, one small globe near the center-right, and one medium-small globe on the left side of the table. Behind him, add a huge circular astrolabe halo with zodiac markings, transparent orbital rings, hanging crystal ornaments, and a vivid blue-purple galaxy sky. Include two vertical hanging banners in the background: the left banner reads 星文祓禮 and the right banner reads 天水星朱. Use a cinematic composition, intense electric-blue rim lighting, bright gold accents, sparkling particles, reflective glass, intricate linework, elegant Japanese fantasy aesthetics, ultra-detailed anime rendering, dramatic depth of field, and a mystical star-sorcery atmosphere.
